title: Legacy backlog batch 10 dispositioned
body: Closed claim fe8b3c7c after processing legacy backlog batch 10 in place. Dispositions: 2 graduated, 3 duplicate. Existing durable homes carried this cluster: PDR shape/Related discipline, PDR-079, ADR-144/consolidate-docs fitness-limit ownership, session-handoff AGENTS.md named extension, and stage-by-pathspec/ADR-177/commit-queue verify-staged fingerprint enforcement. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. Pausing curation per owner direction; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
